---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose an improvement for an app, shared package, workflow, or repository tooling
labels: feature
---

<!--
Use this template for concrete feature proposals.
For support questions or open-ended discussion, please use GitHub Discussions instead.
-->

## Summary

Provide a short description of the proposed feature.

## Affected Area

Select all that apply.

- [ ] apps
- [ ] common
- [ ] docs
- [ ] scripts
- [ ] CI/CD or GitHub Actions

## Problem Or Opportunity

Describe the problem, limitation, or use case behind this request.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you want to see.

## Expected Outcome

Explain what this feature would improve for maintainers, contributors, or downstream projects.

## Example Usage

Include sample API shapes, config examples, CLI usage, screenshots, mockups, or code snippets if relevant.

```text

```

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches, workarounds, or reasons the current behavior is not sufficient.

## Additional Context

Include links to related issues, pull requests, external references, or implementation notes.
